channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: 49ers linemen explain why Jordan Mason is filling McCaffrey’s cleats so effectively
item.description: Running back Jordan Mason has run for the NFL's second-most yards filling in for Christian McCaffrey, who scored four touchdowns the last time the 49ers hosted the Arizona Cardinals.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Messi quickly starts the process of looking ahead after Inter Miami wins MLS Supporters Shield
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — This was how 2024 started for Inter Miami: Lionel Messi, Luis Suarez, Jordi Alba and Sergio Busquets, all former Barcelona teammates who won multiple titles together, sitting side-by-side after the first official training session of the new season.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WWE legend Batista's Hall of Fame induction 'long overdue,' Drew McIntyre says
item.description: WWE star Drew McIntyre told Fox News Digital it's well past time Dave Bautista got his Hall of Fame induction but the former wrestler has to do it on his own terms.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Broncos out to snap 8-game losing streak to Raiders who have long overcome distractions vs. Denver
item.description: The Las Vegas Raiders may be dealing with Davante Adams' situation but they've gotten pretty good at dealing with drama and still beating the Denver Broncos over the last few seasons.
item.dc:creator: Arnie Stapleton, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Brewers' 20-year-old rookie Jackson Chourio stepping up his game in postseason
item.description: That $82 million contract Jackson Chourio signed before ever playing a major league game looks like more and more of a bargain with every swing the Milwaukee Brewers rookie takes this postseason.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mitchell hits tiebreaking HR in the 8th, Chourio goes deep twice and Brewers rally past Mets 5-3
item.description: Jackson Chourio tied the game in the eighth with his second homer of the night and Garrett Mitchell delivered a two-run shot later in the inning to give the Milwaukee Brewers a 5-3 victory over the New York Mets that evened their NL Wild Card Series.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Orioles get swept out of the playoffs in their only series for a second consecutive year
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Things went so poorly for the Baltimore Orioles in the playoffs that even when they had the bases loaded and a hit by pitch scores a run, Colton Cowser swung at a ball thrown right at him, missed and broke his left hand in the process.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Gritty Tigers close out playoff sweep of Astros with 5-2 victory in Game 2 of Wild Card Series
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Manager A.J. Hinch wanted his Detroit Tigers to embody their home city. Hard-working with a never-give-up attitude, but most of all a team that had grit. That's how they stormed into October — and just kept going.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Californians think this is the unofficial boundary between Northern and Southern California
item.description: There is no true defining line that represents the distinction between Northern and Southern California, but it’s still a widely popular debate. Some Californians believe the transition from SoCal to NorCal happens when sports fans cheer for the Giants and 49ers as opposed to the Dodgers and Rams.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aces' quest to threepeat hits 2-0 hole vs Liberty while Sun and Lynx are split in WNBA playoffs
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Las Vegas Aces and Connecticut Sun head home with two very different feelings after the opening two games of their playoff semifinals series. The Aces are trying to save their season against New York while the Sun hope to close out the Minnesota Lynx.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG and DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What to know about the Padres Wild Card Series at Petco Park
item.description: If you are heading to the game, here are some things to know about the best-of-three National League Wild Card Series matchup between the Padres and Atlanta Braves:
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Chastain passes Truex on late restart to win NASCAR Cup Series race at Kansas Speedway
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Kan. (AP) — Ross Chastain finally got to smash a watermelon for the first time this season Sunday at Kansas Speedway. Smashed the hopes of a bunch of playoff drivers trying to earn an automatic berth in the next round, too.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Broncos running back Tyler Badie carted from sideline with a back injury
item.description: Denver Broncos running back Tyler Badie was placed on a back board and carted from the sideline before the start of the second quarter against the New York Jets on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Bears rough up the Rams, move to 2-2
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears offense played turnover-free football and the defense was as advertised in a win over the Los Angeles Rams Sunday at Soldier Field.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Los Angeles Chargers to sell minority stake in team to Detroit Pistons owner
item.description: More than a quarter stake in the Los Angeles Chargers, which has essentially been a family business for decades, will be sold to an NBA owner in the coming weeks, according to reports.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Shohei Ohtani heads to 1st postseason after Dodgers clinch NL West title with a 7-2 win over Padres
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani is headed to the postseason for the first time in his career after the Los Angeles Dodgers won the NL West on Thursday night by scoring five runs in the seventh inning in a 7-2 win over the second-place San Diego Padres.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Cubs fall to Phillies, 9-6, despite Hoerner's 2 HRs and Alcántara's first big-league hit
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Nico Hoerner had the first two-homer game of his career and top prospect Kevin Alcántara notched his first big-league hit for the Cubs on Wednesday night in Philadelphia.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
